character.name: Пётр Ильич
character.description: Soviet factory engineer in his mid-fifties, weathered kind face, deep-set tired intelligent eyes, greying hair combed back, trimmed greying moustache, square jaw, wears a white lab-coat over a grey shirt and thin dark tie at work, or a wool coat and ushanka outside

scenes.voRu: Раньше я вставал затемно. Чайник свистит, жена режет хлеб. Тихо — чтоб детей не разбудить.
scenes.keyframe_prompt_brief: Early morning small Soviet kitchen, 1978. Engineer sits at a small Formica table in an undershirt and grey trousers, steam rising from a glass tea cup in a подстаканник. Whistling kettle on the gas stove. Wife in a patterned housecoat slicing dark bread at the counter. Tungsten lamp, floral wallpaper, window still dark.
scenes.motion_prompt: Very subtle locked-off camera. Steam from the tea cup rises slowly. Wife's hand gently slices one slice of bread. Engineer lifts the cup with measured calm. No camera movement.

scenes.voRu: Иду в цех. Снег скрипит под сапогами, фонари жёлтые. Все идут в одну сторону.
scenes.keyframe_prompt_brief: Early Soviet winter morning street. Engineer in a dark wool coat, ushanka, felt boots, walking along a snowy sidewalk at dawn. Behind him, other workers in quilted jackets walking the same direction. Yellow sodium streetlamps, factory smokestacks silhouetted in the distance, soft falling snow. Pre-dawn blue light.
scenes.motion_prompt: Slow forward dolly follow-shot from behind. Engineer walks steadily, snow crunches. Falling snow drifts. Other figures move in the same direction. Yellow streetlamp slightly flickers.

scenes.voRu: Свой станок знаешь как свою руку. Гудит. Масло, металл. Работаешь — и не замечаешь времени.
scenes.keyframe_prompt_brief: Inside a Soviet industrial шоп (factory shop floor), 1978. Engineer now in a white lab-coat over grey shirt, stands at a large green-painted metal lathe машине, hand on a heavy brass control wheel, watching a steel workpiece spin. Bright overhead industrial fluorescent tubes, oily metal shavings on the floor, dusty wire-glass windows behind.
scenes.motion_prompt: Medium locked-off shot. The lathe spindle rotates continuously, faint steam rises. Engineer adjusts the brass wheel with one slow precise turn, watches the workpiece intently. Ambient shop atmosphere.

scenes.voRu: Обед в столовой. Щи. Котлета с пюре. Компот из сухофруктов. Двадцать копеек.
scenes.keyframe_prompt_brief: Top-down overhead view of a metal canteen tray on a Formica столовая table, 1978 Soviet factory canteen. On the tray: a deep ceramic bowl of thick щи (cabbage soup) with sour cream floating, a plate with one котлета and mashed potatoes with a sprig of dill, a faceted гранёный glass of dried-fruit компот with a piece of prune visible, a slice of dark rye bread, a bent aluminum spoon and fork, a crumpled paper napkin. Warm canteen light, faint reflections of other trays and people blurred around edges.
scenes.motion_prompt: Very slow locked-off top-down. Steam from the soup rises gently. The surface of the компот slightly trembles. No camera movement. Hands do not enter the frame.

scenes.voRu: Вечером домой. Тот же снег, те же фонари. Только в окне уже свет — ждут.
scenes.keyframe_prompt_brief: Evening Soviet residential courtyard, 1978. Engineer in the dark wool coat and ushanka walking home through fresh snow toward a five-story brick хрущёвка apartment block. One window on the second floor is warmly lit amber behind a curtain. Yellow streetlamps, blue-grey winter twilight sky, a single cat silhouette on the path.
scenes.motion_prompt: Slow forward dolly. Engineer walks toward the building, snow crunches faintly. Amber window light glows steadily. Falling snow.

scenes.voRu: Жена, дети, горячий ужин. Телевизор тихо бормочет. Тогда не знали, что это было счастье. Просто жили.
scenes.keyframe_prompt_brief: Warm Soviet family kitchen at dinner, 1978. Engineer (still in grey shirt, tie loose) sits at the head of a small round table with a white embroidered tablecloth. Wife in a patterned housecoat serves a steaming dish of картошка с мясом. Two children, about 8 and 11, sit quietly eating. In the background: a small black-and-white телевизор on a shelf, tuned to evening news, a glass cabinet with crystal glasses, a ковёр (patterned rug) hanging on the wall. Tungsten lamp overhead, soft warm amber light.
scenes.motion_prompt: Medium locked-off. Steam rises from the dish. Wife serves one ladle, sits down. Children quietly eat. Engineer picks up fork. The TV's faint flicker on the wall. No camera movement.

music.note: Canonical TikTok trend Soviet bed. Single era — no DJ-drop.
